## Operating rules

1. Branch: `chore/roadmap-progress-catchup-2026-06-02` off main.
2. Single commit, doc-only.
3. **`pnpm lint` must pass** (catches any markdown syntax issues).
4. **No code or test changes.** This is strictly progress.md + roadmap.md edits.
5. Hard ABORT on 3 failed Edits.

## Phase −2 — Pre-flight

```
git fetch origin && git checkout main && git pull
git status; git branch --show-current
git checkout -b chore/roadmap-progress-catchup-2026-06-02
```

## The work

### 1. Update progress.md

Read the current `progress.md`. Find the most recent "Today / 2026-06-01" or "2026-06-02" entry. Append a new section dated **2026-06-02** with the 6 PRs above. Use the existing tone and formatting style of nearby entries (short, factual, links each PR by number).

If no current dated section exists, append a new one at the top of the dated log.

### 2. Update roadmap.md

Read the current `roadmap.md`. For each item below, find the matching roadmap line and update its status flag:

- §5A.3 "Quote scope grouped-by-discipline drag reorder" → mark **✅ done (PR #287)** if it has a status flag, or append `— ✅ PR #287 (2026-06-02)` if not.
- §5A.3 "Sites module detail page" → **✅ done (PR #288)**.
- Pre-deploy onboarding docs (§6 or §5A.3 area) → **✅ done (PR #286)**.
- Migration drift reconciliation (§6 deploy-blocker line) → **✅ done (PR #289)**.
- §2 "Admin reset password" → **🚧 partial — backend scaffold landed (PR #291), UI + tests + audit log pending**. (Do NOT mark fully done — PR #291 is explicitly WIP.)

If you can't locate one of these lines, leave it untouched and note in the PR body which ones you couldn't find.

### 3. Update progress.md "open PRs" / "in-flight" section

If progress.md has a section listing currently-open PRs (a "Currently open" or similar block), update it to reflect: **0 open PRs** (or 1 — PR-54 might be open by the time this runs; check `gh pr list --state open` and use the live count).

## Scope — do NOT do

- Do NOT rewrite or reorganise existing roadmap structure.

## If stuck

- If one of the merged PRs doesn't have a corresponding roadmap line → list it in the PR body under "Couldn't locate" and continue with the rest.
